changes.description: Continue button now merges editedCategories into previewRows via onPreviewLoaded before calling onContinue, so user category selections propagate to the confirm step.
Added formError state with visible error message when amount is invalid (NaN or <= 0). Clears on each submit attempt.
Added formError state with visible error message when amount is invalid (NaN or <= 0). Same pattern as add-expense.
Added JWT structure validation (parts.length === 3) before atob decoding. Invalid tokens are cleared immediately.
